Community Info Welcome to Lofts On Main, a unique apartment community located in the heart of Plattsmouth, NE, blending modern living with historic charm. Residence Features ✩  Large Windows ✩  Walk-in Closets ✩  Designer Lighting and Interior Features ✩  Ceiling Fans ✩  Dishwasher ✩  Refrigerator/Freezer ✩  Microwave ✩  Solid Surface Countertops ✩  Washer and Dryer Included ✩  Oven/Range ✩  Unique One, Two and Three Bedroom Floor Plans ✩  Modern Appliances ✩  Faux Wood Flooring ✩  Abundant Storage ✩  Fully Equipped Kitchen Community Features ✩  Professional, Caring On-site Management and Maintenance Team ✩  Resident Lounge ✩  Historic building, New Apartments ✩  Walk to Dining, Shopping, and Entertainment ✩  Playground ✩  Controlled Building Access/Entry ✩  Located in Historic Downtown Plattsmouth ✩  Resident Community Room ✩  Indoor Basketball ✩  Fitness Center ✩  Community Garden ✩  Quick, Easy Access to Highway 75 ✩  Recycling ✩  Pet Friendly Community ✩  Bicycle Parking Pet Policy Pets Welcome upon Approval.
